blockingIssues.description: No completed hr-payroll fix feature addresses the prior migration_v2 parity gap for V150 payroll schema additions, so the original scrutiny failure remains unresolved.

Re-run evidence still shows codered payroll validation failure under flyway-v2: CR_PayrollIdempotencyConcurrencyTest exits with 10 errors (missing finished_good_batches.source column), so milestone evidence is not yet complete.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For schema-heavy payroll changes, add an explicit migration_v2/codered smoke validator to scrutiny gating so migration-path regressions are surfaced before milestone completion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Standard validators (compile + gate-fast + advisory lint) passed, but CR_PayrollIdempotencyConcurrencyTest still fails with flyway-v2 schema mismatch outside default hard gates.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the intentional manual-construction pattern in PayrollService (instead of Spring DI) or migrate it to standard DI to avoid future worker confusion when adding dependencies.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-payroll-calculation-size review found PayrollService manually constructs PayrollRunService, PayrollCalculationService, PayrollPostingService, StatutoryDeductionEngine, and PayrollCalculationSupport via new even though the latter classes are annotated @Service.

rejectedObservations.observation: Task-based reviewer spawn failure due to model alias mismatch reported in round-1 review artifacts
